[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 110000011 4
2 010101100 4
3 100000011 3
4 100100000 2
5 100110100 4
6 101000110 4
7 001100111 5

70 07 000100011 3
